displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Authentic Tea House offers a wide range of ready-to-drink beverages that give you an experience of authentic tea, in convenience. Ayataka No Sugar Japanese Green Tea is brewed from premium tea leaves and high grade matcha, giving you the cloudiness of a real pot-brewed Japanese green tea. Made without added flavouring and sugar, you can savor the goodness of Authentic Tea House Ayataka Japanese green tea, without the calories. Singapore Healthier Choice with zero calories.

product.description:
FUZE TEA™ is an international tea brand from The Coca-Cola Company available in over 90+ countries, now in Singapore! FUZE TEA™ is a unique proposition that offers a variety of flavors, real brewed tea, no added preservatives and with reduced sugar. FUZE TEA™ is available in 5 flavors:
• Jasmine Green Tea (reduced sugar, no added preservatives, real brewed tea)
• Ice Lemon Tea (reduced sugar, no added preservatives, real brewed tea)
• Passionfruit (reduced sugar, no added preservatives)
• Mango (reduced sugar, no added preservatives)
• Lychee (reduced sugar, no added preservatives)

metaData.Ingredients:
Water, Green Tea, Sucrose, Flavouring (Includes Natural Jasmine Flavour), Sodium Ascorbate, Sodium Bicarbonate and Dimethyl Polysiloxane (as Anti-Foaming Agent)
• Contains permitted food additives of non-animals origin
